Package io.cloudstub.core.spi

Interface StubRegistrar

All Known Implementing Classes:
WireMockStubRegistrar
public interface StubRegistrar
Facade through which service modules register HTTP stubs without any direct dependency on the underlying networking driver (WireMock). The implementation lives in cloudstub-core's internal package and is never exposed.

Three routing protocols are supported, one per AWS request style:

  • XML / Form URL (SQS, SNS) — matched on the Action form body parameter.
  • JSON / X-Amz-Target (Secrets Manager, DynamoDB) — matched on the X-Amz-Target header.
  • REST path (S3) — matched on HTTP method and path regex.

Each protocol comes in two flavours:

  • Template stubs take a Handlebars response string. The networking driver evaluates it at request time, echoing back request fields (queue names, message bodies) with no Java code in the module. These are stateless — every call gets the same templated answer.
  • Stateful stubs take a StubHandler instead. The handler runs module Java code on each matching request with access to the shared StateStore, so what a user sends in one call can be returned by a later call.

  • Method Details

    • registerXmlFormStub

      void registerXmlFormStub(String actionName, String responseTemplate)
      Registers a stub for XML/Form URL services (e.g. SQS, SNS).

      Matches any POST request whose application/x-www-form-urlencoded body contains Action=<actionName>.

      Parameters:
      actionName - the value of the Action form parameter, e.g. "SendMessage"
      responseTemplate - Handlebars template for the HTTP response body

    • registerJsonTargetStub

      void registerJsonTargetStub(String target, String responseTemplate)
      Registers a stub for JSON / X-Amz-Target services (e.g. Secrets Manager, DynamoDB).

      Matches any POST request whose X-Amz-Target header equals target.

      Parameters:
      target - full target header value, e.g. "secretsmanager.GetSecretValue"
      responseTemplate - Handlebars template for the HTTP response body

    • registerRestStub

      void registerRestStub(HttpMethod method, String pathPattern, String responseTemplate)
      Registers a stub for REST path-based services (e.g. S3).

      Matches requests whose HTTP method equals method and whose path matches pathPattern as a regular expression.

      Parameters:
      method - HTTP method to match
      pathPattern - regular expression matched against the request path
      responseTemplate - Handlebars template for the HTTP response body

    • registerJsonTargetStub

      void registerJsonTargetStub(String target, StubHandler handler)
      Registers a stateful stub for JSON / X-Amz-Target services (e.g. SQS, DynamoDB).

      Matches like registerJsonTargetStub(String, String), but invokes handler on each request instead of rendering a static template, giving the module access to the shared StateStore.

      Parameters:
      target - full target header value, e.g. "AmazonSQS.SendMessage"
      handler - request-time handler with access to the state store

    • registerXmlFormStub

      void registerXmlFormStub(String actionName, StubHandler handler)
      Registers a stateful stub for XML/Form URL services (e.g. SQS, SNS).

      Matches like registerXmlFormStub(String, String), but invokes handler on each request instead of rendering a static template.

      Parameters:
      actionName - the value of the Action form parameter, e.g. "SendMessage"
      handler - request-time handler with access to the state store

    • registerRestStub

      void registerRestStub(HttpMethod method, String pathPattern, StubHandler handler)
      Registers a stateful stub for REST path-based services (e.g. S3).

      Matches like registerRestStub(HttpMethod, String, String), but invokes handler on each request instead of rendering a static template.

      Parameters:
      method - HTTP method to match
      pathPattern - regular expression matched against the request path
      handler - request-time handler with access to the state store
